title: Letter to Avanti West Coast Rail about recent cancellations and poor service - Bill Esterson
headings: h2: Bill Esterson MP for Sefton Central
text_excerpt: Letter to Avanti West Coast Rail about recent cancellations and poor service - Bill Esterson Join Get Involved Donate Bill Esterson MP for Sefton Central About News Bill’s Blog Campaigns Save Rimrose Valley Foetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder Persimmon Homes in Maghull Search Search Parliament My Speeches and Debates Pay and Expenses Visit Parliament Search Search Contact Can Bill help you? Events Newsletter Search Search Search Search Twitter Facebook Youtube Letter to Avanti West Coast Rail about recent cancellations and poor service Despite previous assurances from government and Avanti West Coast that they had a plan to improve the service, we have seen yet more cancellations and timetable disruption with all the inconvenience that follows. I have received countless correspondence from constituents whose lives have been made miserable by this shoddy service. Avanti West Coast have run this franchise since December 2019. They must take responsibility. I let Avanti know that this isn’t acceptable. To improve rail services, the government must remove the franchise from Avanti and run it as a public service in public hands. Only then can shortages of drivers be addressed. Letter from Bill Esterson to Avanti West Coast My constituents deserve a decent rail service and they do not receive such a service from Avanti. Bill Esterson Share — Social channels Twitter Facebook Youtube Contact details Space Solutions Business Centre, Liverpool, UK View on Google Maps Email: bill.esterson.mp@parliament.uk Further details Printed and Promoted by Maurice Byrne on behalf of Sefton Central Labour Party, both at Space Solutions Business Centre, Sefton Lane Industrial Estate, Sefton Lane, L31 8BX ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
